{{Quote|A little bit of tertium, always nice.|Gormaanda|<ref name="THS" />}}
'''Tertium''' was an [[Foodstuff/Legends|additive]] that could be [[Diet/Legends|eaten]] by [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiees]] and members of the [[Chef/Legends|chef]] [[Gormaanda/Legends|Gormaanda's]] [[Species/Legends|species]].<ref name="THS" /> Tertium was used in the [[Dexter Jettster's nerfsteak seasoning|nerfsteak seasoning]] of the [[Besalisk/Legends|Besalisk]] chef [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]]. He [[Merchant/Legends|sold]] the seasoning along with his [[Nerf steak/Legends|nerfsteak]] and [[gartro]] [[Egg/Legends|eggs]] at his [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]], [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]], located on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]<ref name="Dex" /> prior to the eatery's destruction during the first two [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]].<ref name="DexEra">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'' states that [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] was destroyed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' places ''Underworld'' around [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]]. Since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' states that the Empire was [[Declaration of a New Order|formed]] in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], Dex's Diner was destroyed in either 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] or 18 BBY.</ref>

Gormaanda's recipe for the holiday dish [[Bantha rump|Bantha Surprise]] also called for tertium, and she included it in an [[Instruction cassette|instructional]] cooking [[Holovid/Legends|holovid]] that explained how to make the dish.<ref name="THS" /> In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],<ref name="Date">{{SW|url=news/the-star-wars-holiday-special-cantina-we-may-not-thrive-friend-but-we-survive-friend|text=''The Star Wars Holiday Special'' Cantina: Who's Who|int=The Star Wars Holiday Special Cantina: Who's Who|nolive=1}} dates the events of ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]'' to [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]].</ref> the video was viewed by the Wookiee [[Mallatobuck/Legends|Mallatobuck]], who followed the recipe in order to make her own Bantha Surprise.<ref name="THS" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tertium was first mentioned in the [[1978]] television film ''[[The Star Wars Holiday Special]]''.<ref name="THS" />
